subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Hidden Mystery and the Treasured Secret [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لهو السر المکنون و الکنز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
